case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2231.41 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-01-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2231.41 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF BRUCE SYLVESTER;, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR MAY-01-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF BRUCE SYLVESTER IS DENIED. IT IS CLEAR FROM THE VERIFIED CLAIM FORM THAT CLAIMANT IS ASSERTING AN INTEREST IN $2,231.41 AND REQUESTS THAT IT NOT BE ORDERED FORFEITED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRUCE SYLVESTER, CLAIMANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Strike The Claim Of Bruce Sylvester IS Denied. It is clear from the verified claim form that claimant is asserting an interest in $2,231.41 and requests that it not be ordered forfeited. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
